ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "expanded_urls" TEXT /* Expanded URLs associated with the tweet */,
  "rating_numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator of the rating given to the dog */,
  "rating_denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator of the rating given to the dog */,
  "dog_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "dog_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the dog (e.g., doggo, puppo) */,
  "dog_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the dog */,
  "jpg_url" TEXT /* URL of the dog's image */,
  "img_num" INTEGER /* Number of images associated with the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engagement associated with the tweet */,
  "image_ids" TEXT /* List of image IDs associated with the tweet */,
  "dog_ids" TEXT /* List of dog IDs featured in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_dog_name FOREIGN KEY ("dog_name") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_engagement_id FOREIGN KEY ("engagement_id") REFERENCES engagements ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "dog_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "dog_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the dog (e.g., doggo, puppo) */,
  "dog_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the dog */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the dog in years */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the dog in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the breed */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the breed */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the breed in kilograms */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the breed in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., doggo, puppo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the image is associated with */,
  "jpg_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "img_num" INTEGER /* Number of images associated with the tweet */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the rating is associated with */,
  "rating_numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator of the rating given to the dog */,
  "rating_denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator of the rating given to the dog */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the engagement is associated with */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets associated with the tweet */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites associated with the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the engagement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the engagement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_dog" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_image" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_rating" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_user" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_engagement" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
